title: Fix SmeltGoal.HasFailed dead code — never returns true
description:
SmeltGoal.HasFailed checks for fact key `goal:SmeltItem:{inputItem}:failed` but this key is never written by any code path (TryRouteAsError, DispatchActionsAsync, ProcessEventsAsync all write different fact keys). The method will always return false. If smelt operations fail, the goal relies solely on _consecutiveFailures >= maxFailures to abort.

Compare with CraftItemGoal.HasFailed which has the same problem pattern. This is a pre-existing architectural issue, not specific to Sprint 44.

Council confidence: 100%. Severity: Medium (P2).
